items.title: What is the difference between hot stone and Himalayan stone massage?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Hot Stone Massage: What It Is and How It Works
expanded_element.description: You may already be familiar with hot stone massage, a massage technique that uses heated basalt rocks as an extension of the massage therapist's hands to provide additional relaxation. A Himalayan massage uses the same techniques but swaps out the dark basalt stones for stones of pink Himalayan salt.

items.title: Is a Himalayan salt stone massage worth it?

expanded_element.title: The Benefits of Himalayan Salt Stone Massage
expanded_element.description: One major benefit of this massage is an improvement in the skin's appearance. The mineral content in Himalayan salt provides exfoliation and improves circulation, leaving the Clients' skin looking smooth and soft. As this massage utilizes heated salt stones, Himalayan salt can also work as an anti-inflammatory tool.

expanded_element.title: Elements Massage Wayland MA
expanded_element.description: The minerals in the Himalayan salt are believed to have calming properties, promoting a sense of peace and relaxation.
